Launched in April 2023, the project aims to embrace the lighthearted and humorous side of cryptocurrency by creating a token centered around internet culture and community engagement. Rather than focusing on complex use cases or utility, PEPE is built around the idea of shared fun and cultural relevance."}}}},{"item":{"id":"bitcoin","coin_id":1,"name":"Bitcoin","symbol":"BTC","market_cap_rank":1,"thumb":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/1/standard/bitcoin.png?1696501400","small":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/1/small/bitcoin.png?1696501400","large":"https://coin-images.coingecko.com/coins/images/1/large/bitcoin.png?1696501400","slug":"bitcoin","price_btc":1.0,"score":7,"data":{"price":75103.63998641173,"price_btc":"1.0","price_change_percentage_24h":{"aed":1.5271498801026944,"ars":0.9701268819891598,"aud":0.8099805898517405,"bch":-0.9968150315184783,"bdt":1.2188303602567752,"bhd":1.5309185496443314,"bmd":1.5271498801026777,"bnb":-0.3403176540800163,"brl":1.6656219146131919,"btc":0.0,"cad":1.1506359944965352,"chf":1.5118127654464621,"clp":1.3233582668653723,"cny":1.5256607100030923,"czk":1.3493149718923747,"dkk":1.4003049299976735,"dot":-3.6856856762077816,"eos":-1.579094869346205,"eth":-0.24097837999619318,"eur":1.3916229505186586,"gbp":1.4709528208667146,"gel":1.7162134739204062,"hkd":1.4566540457005632,"huf":1.1674977320208173,"idr":1.5487883139988705,"ils":0.6493314140218492,"inr":1.517909623481458,"jpy":1.438141131706717,"krw":1.4541548970080749,"kwd":1.399759123331027,"lkr":1.4520931177069274,"ltc":-1.1340662555071468,"mmk":1.5271498801026957,"mxn":1.388228519619425,"myr":1.5528399483921893,"ngn":0.9227545711473715,"nok":0.836371928887211,"nzd":1.3606066716716287,"php":1.2106979605132,"pkr":1.2008198387934073,"pln":1.188250507875521,"rub":1.690786298787682,"sar":1.5089940950740546,"sek":0.98695938851951,"sgd":1.41318632780142,"sol":-1.2308640941400124,"thb":1.3049078221962884,"try":1.5809009944445367,"twd":1.2487625811738645,"uah":1.3066686828963248,"usd":1.5271498801026777,"vef":1.5271498801026722,"vnd":1.4470249756124995,"xag":0.1339667820299594,"xau":1.3558662473155179,"xdr":1.390537580980023,"xlm":-1.4746222592854816,"xrp":-1.988254857211733,"yfi":-3.249394898116529,"zar":1.3060107976276032,"bits":0.0034570971434925
